title: Agent Frontmatter Schema
description: Schema for Claude Code agent (.claude/agents/*.md) YAML frontmatter fields

description.description: Brief description of the agent's purpose and capabilities

tools.description: List of tools the agent is allowed to use (e.g., Read, Write, Bash)

disallowedTools.description: List of tools the agent is NOT allowed to use

model.description: Model override for this agent (e.g., sonnet, opus, haiku)

maxTurns.description: Maximum number of turns the agent can take before stopping

skills.description: List of skills available to this agent

mcpServers.description: MCP servers available to this agent. Can be an object with server name keys and config values, or an array mixing inline definitions and string references.

hooks.description: Hook configuration specific to this agent

memory.description: Whether the agent has access to memory

background.description: Whether the agent runs in the background

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the agent

initialPrompt.description: Initial prompt sent to the agent when it starts

color.description: Display color for the agent in terminal UI
